Source   Edit  

Research Advancement

Tech level progression and breakthroughs per economy.md:4.1

Advancement rules:

  • Levels purchased on turns 1 and 7 (bi-annual)
  • Sequential order only (must buy level N before N+1)
  • One level per field per upgrade cycle
  • Breakthroughs rolled bi-annually (10% base + investment bonus)
Upgrade Cycles (economy.md:4.1)Research Breakthroughs (economy.md:4.1.1)Tech Level Advancement

Imports

types, costs, ../../common/types/tech, ../prestige, ../config/prestige_config, ../config/tech_config

Procs

proc applyBreakthrough(tree: var TechTree; breakthrough: BreakthroughType;
                       allocation: ResearchAllocation): BreakthroughEvent {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc isUpgradeTurn(turn: int): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if current turn is an upgrade turn Per economy.md:4.1: Turns 1 and 7 of each year (months 1 and 7) Source   Edit   
proc rollBreakthrough(investedRP: int; rng: var Rand): Option[BreakthroughType] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Roll for research breakthrough Per economy.md:4.1.1

Base chance: 10% +1% per 50 RP invested (last 6 turns)

Source   Edit  

Exports

TechAdvancement, BreakthroughEvent, TechTree
